title: Turkiye vs USA: Insane 98th-Minute World Cup Thriller!
hook: A 98th-minute winner decides a World Cup thriller!
voiceover: A 98th-minute winner decides a World Cup thriller! The USA strikes first when Auston Trusty scores early. But Turkiye fights back! Arda Güler levels it, and Baris Alper Yilmaz grabs the lead. The USA responds as Sebastian Berhalter equalizes to make it 2-2. Then, in the ninety-eighth minute, chaos! Kaan Ayhan scores the dramatic winner to seal a 3-2 victory for Turkiye! Subscribe for more epic football drama!
caption: Kaan Ayhan wins it at the death for Turkiye in a 5-goal World Cup classic!
